entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop studied for nodulation and carbon partitioning.

entities.name: NODULATION CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of chickpea cultivars to form nodules for nitrogen fixation.

entities.name: NODULE NUMBER
entities.description: The count of nodules formed on the roots of the plant.

entities.name: NODULE MASS
entities.description: The total weight of the nodules formed on the roots.

entities.name: CARBON BUDGETING
entities.description: The allocation and distribution of carbon resources within the plant.

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form for the plant.

entities.name: MINERAL NITROGEN LEVEL
entities.description: The concentration of available mineral nitrogen in the soil.

entities.name: 14C-PHOTOSYNTHATE
entities.description: Carbon-14 labeled photosynthates used to track the distribution of carbon in plant parts.

entities.name: TOTAL PLANT BIOMASS
entities.description: The overall mass of the chickpea plant.

entities.name: ROOT SHOOT RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of the mass of the roots to the mass of the shoots.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process of nitrogen fixation carried out by biological organisms, often referred to as BNF.

entities.name: ROOT PRODUCTION
entities.description: The growth and development of the root system.
